_doc: Auto-promote security surface for the gc curation routine (P-0082 Phase 0). A candidate whose source_paths touch ANY glob below is NEVER auto-promoted -> routed to needs-human (advise-only under the C-hybrid model). Deterministic deny-set; matched by _classify_match (gitignore-style globs). Hot-editable. Destination: gc repo maintainer/auto_promote_security_surface.json.
_model: C-hybrid + T0. Auto-promote ONLY when: net-new (additive) AND kind in {skill,doc} AND layer=candidate-common AND no source_path matches this surface AND (for kind=skill) skill frontmatter is not governance/security-themed AND trusted non-revoked origin AND structural-valid AND no secrets AND not a previously-rejected digest AND trial-apply CI green. Everything else -> advise-only.
_source: P-0082 Phase 0, settled 2026-06-01. Globs expressed in consumer-relative form (what a candidate declares in source_paths); they also match the gc package layout.

enforcement_guards._why: Execute as PreToolUse/PostToolUse guards. Adding/altering one changes enforcement for everyone.

auth_lease._why: Authentication / licensing / consumer authorization. Tampering bypasses the lease gate.

constitution_contracts._why: Constitution clauses, contracts, governance source. Contract changes break consumers.

routing_classify._why: Router / classify configs that drive gating + auto-injection.

pipeline_self_protection._why: CRITICAL: the candidate pipeline + CI the routine itself uses. A candidate altering this could subvert the auto-promote gate -> privilege escalation. Never auto.

settings._why: Claude Code permissions + hook registration. Controls what runs.

install_distribution._why: Install / materialization / cross-clone distribution. A bad change propagates structurally.

skill_theme_supplement._why: Path alone cannot separate generic vs governance skills (both live in commands/ or skills/). For kind=skill, also parse the skill frontmatter.
